title: clutia natalensis var. genuina
intro: Clutia natalensis var. genuina, also known as the bitter bush, is a plant species native to southern Africa, characterized by its bitter taste and medicinal properties. Traditionally used in folk medicine, the plant has been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Clutia natalensis var. genuina include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate fever, and treat various bacterial and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
